name: TurboQuant Context Sweep
description: Benchmark TurboQuant vs Standard KV cache at increasing context lengths. Finds the crossover point where TurboQuant becomes advantageous in memory and/or throughput.
base_prompt: Based on the above document, provide a comprehensive summary of the key themes and findings.
notes: context_sizes are approximate target token counts (actual depends on tokenizer)
kv_bits=0 means standard KV cache (no TurboQuant)
filler_text_source is replicated to reach target context size
Run with: gemma4-cli profile sweep --scenarios docs/benchmarks/scenarios.json
